name: Missed work after ladder fall on job, how to get paid?
description: File TTD claim for 2/3 wages—doctor note required.

mainEntity.name: Missed work after ladder fall on job, how to get paid?

acceptedAnswer.text: File TTD claim for 2/3 wages—doctor note required.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Temporary total disability (TTD)** pays 66% wages from day 4 (Utah) or loss day (Idaho).[1][6]

Medical proof needed.

- Doctor work restrictions.
- Submit pay stubs.

Light duty offered? Compare pay.
